heading: Businesses knowingly promoted by electronic mail with false or misleading transmission information
label: 7705 Businesses knowingly promoted by electronic mail with false or misleading transmission information
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in subsec. (d), was in the original “this Act”, meaning , , , which is classified principally to this chapter. children.text: knows, or should have known in the ordinary course of that person’s trade or business, that the goods, products, property, or services sold, offered for sale, leased or offered for lease, or otherwise made available through that trade or business were being promoted in such a message;
received or expected to receive an economic benefit from such promotion; and

children.label: B
children.text: to detect the transmission and report it to the Commission.

children.heading: Limited enforcement against third parties
children.label: b Limited enforcement against third parties

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Except as provided in paragraph (2), a person (hereinafter referred to as the “third party”) that provides goods, products, property, or services to another person that violates subsection (a) shall not be held liable for such violation.

children.label: A
children.text: owns, or has a greater than 50 percent ownership or economic interest in, the trade or business of the person that violated subsection (a); or

children.label: i
children.text: has actual knowledge that goods, products, property, or services are promoted in a commercial electronic mail message the transmission of which is in violation of ; andsection 7704(a)(1) of this title

children.label: ii
children.text: receives, or expects to receive, an economic benefit from such promotion.

children.heading: Exclusive enforcement by FTC
children.label: c Exclusive enforcement by FTC
children.text: Subsections (f) and (g) of do not apply to violations of this section.section 7706 of this title

children.heading: Savings provision
children.label: d Savings provision
children.text: Except as provided in , nothing in this section may be construed to limit or prevent any action that may be taken under this chapter with respect to any violation of any other section of this chapter.section 7706(f)(8) of this title
